common.name: Name
common.apply_to_years_tooltip: Apply values to other fiscal years
common.fill_forward_hint: Apply value to all subsequent months of this fiscal year

diff.error_no_data: Error: The AI returned no valid data.

apply_to_years.title: Apply Data
apply_to_years.hint: Select the fiscal years to which the data should be applied.

settings.title: Settings
settings.disclaimer_text: The data generated by this application is for simulation purposes only and does not constitute investment, legal, or tax advice. Despite careful calculation, the developer assumes no liability for the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the results. Entrepreneurship always involves risks; please consult qualified professional advisors for business-critical decisions.

smtp.title: E-Mail (SMTP) Settings
smtp.hint: Configure your SMTP server to send project data directly from the app.
smtp.test_success: Test successful! The email was sent.

ai_parameters.title: AI Model Parameters & Interfaces
ai_parameters.hint: AI functionality can be used locally via Ollama or via external cloud providers (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude). API keys are stored exclusively locally.
ai_parameters.search_provider_ddg_hint: Uses the DuckDuckGo HTML Proxy. No API keys needed.
ai_parameters.search_provider_brave_hint: Uses Brave Search (HTML Scraper). Good results, no keys needed.
ai_parameters.search_provider_google_hint: Direct Google Scraping. Can be unstable (Bot protection).
ai_parameters.apikey_hint: This key is stored exclusively locally in this app and only used for direct API calls to the provider.
ai_parameters.openai_key_hint: This key is stored exclusively locally. For vLLM or local APIs (without key), you can enter 'vllm' or any text here.
ai_parameters.openai_base_url_hint: The base URL of your vLLM instance or another OpenAI-compatible service (e.g., LM Studio). Leave empty for standard OpenAI.
ai_parameters.ollama_hint: The base URL of your local Ollama instance.
ai_parameters.ollama_port_hint: Note: If this app uses port 3000, which you need for OpenWebUI, change the port in server.ts.
ai_parameters.search_hint: DuckDuckGo is used by default. Brave and Google are also available natively (via internal proxy/scraper).
ai_parameters.test_ollama_error: Connection failed: {{message}}. Check OLLAMA_ORIGINS="*" and if Ollama is running.
ai_parameters.test_search_error: Connection failed: {{message}}. This is usually due to 'Mixed Content' or SearXNG is unreachable.

ai_persona.title: AI Persona
ai_persona.manage_hint: Create a new persona, select one, and edit, export, or delete the selected persona.
ai_persona.limit_message: You have already reached the maximum number of 5 individual personas.
ai_persona.format_error: The JSON file does not have the expected persona format (required: name, prompt).
ai_persona.import_failed_details: Code 404 - The file is corrupted or has a wrong format. Details: {{message}}

delete_modal.title: Delete Persona
delete_modal.confirm_text: Do you really want to delete the persona "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

premade_error.title: Action not possible
premade_error.message: Premade personas cannot be edited, deleted, or exported.

ai_prompt.title: AI Instructions (System Prompts)
ai_prompt.manage_hint: Determines how the assistant responds and which financial rules it follows.
ai_prompt.limit_message: You have already reached the maximum number of 25 individual prompts.
ai_prompt.format_error: The JSON file does not have the expected prompt format (required: name, description, prompt).
ai_prompt.import_failed_details: Code 404 - The file is corrupted or has a wrong format. Details: {{message}}

delete_modal.title: Delete Prompt
delete_modal.confirm_text: Do you really want to delete the prompt "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

premade_error.title: Action not possible
premade_error.message: Premade prompts cannot be edited, deleted, or exported.

signatures.title: Email Signatures
signatures.hint: Create and manage signatures that you can select when sending emails.
signatures.invalid_format: Invalid format. The file must be a list of signatures.

templates.title: Email Templates
templates.hint: Create and manage email templates (subject & content) for your project export.
templates.invalid_format: Invalid format. The file must be a list of templates.

knowledge_base.empty: No documents found in knowledge base.

input.placeholder: Ask a question... (Shift+Enter for new line)

web_search_tooltip.forced: Web search is FORCED for the next request
web_search_tooltip.auto: Web search occurs automatically if needed

local_knowledge_tooltip.forced: Knowledge base search is FORCED for the next request
local_knowledge_tooltip.auto: Knowledge search occurs automatically if needed

body.welcome: Welcome to Louis AI Assistant! How can I help you today?
body.instruction_1: Give instructions to change your plan (e.g., "Increase rent by 5% from next year").
body.instruction_2: Ask analytical questions (e.g., "Conduct a SWOT analysis").

proposal.title: Change Proposal:
proposal.confirm_text: Do you really want to create a new, empty project? Unsaved changes will be lost.

review.title: 🔍 Data Review
review.description: Please review the extracted data before saving.

training.export_tooltip_no_feedback: Rate answers to collect training data

investor_summary.label: Investor Summary
investor_summary.prompt: Summarize the key metrics and business model in a form suitable for an investor.

swot.label: Conduct SWOT Analysis
swot.prompt: Conduct a SWOT analysis (strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, risks) for my current financial plan.

marketing.label: Suggest Marketing Ideas
marketing.prompt: Give me three creative marketing ideas that could fit my business model.

risks.label: Analyze Risks
risks.prompt: Analyze the biggest financial risks in my current plan. Focus on aspects like liquidity bottlenecks, high fixed costs, or unrealistic sales plans.

profitability.label: Improve Profitability
profitability.prompt: Suggest three concrete, actionable measures to improve profitability, including a brief justification.

cost_reduction.label: Where do you see potential for cost reduction?
cost_reduction.prompt: Where do you see the greatest potential for cost reduction in my plan? Give me 3 concrete suggestions with justification.

check_data.label: Check Master Data
check_data.prompt: Check my master data for completeness and give me improvement suggestions.

rename.label: Rename Project
rename.prompt: Rename my project to 'Growth Plan 2025'. Return only the modified data object.

analyze.label: Analyze Private Needs
analyze.prompt: Analyze my private needs. Where do I see the largest monthly expenses and how do they develop over the years?

inflation.label: Apply Inflation Adjustment
inflation.prompt: Increase all my private expenses by 3% starting from the next fiscal year to account for inflation. Return only the modified data object.

equity_vs_debt.label: Equity vs. Debt
equity_vs_debt.prompt: Compare the advantages and disadvantages of equity vs. debt for my current project.

new_loan.label: Add New Loan
new_loan.prompt: Add a new KfW loan of €50,000 at 4.5% interest and a term of 5 years. Start date is the beginning of next month. Return only the modified data object.

check_funding.label: Check Capital Requirements
check_funding.prompt: Check if my current financing is sufficient to cover planned investments and startup costs.

explain_afa.label: What does "AfA" mean?
explain_afa.prompt: Explain to me what "AfA" means and why it's important for my financial planning.

new_car.label: Add New Company Car
new_car.prompt: Add a new company car for €40,000 with a useful life of 6 years. The purchase date is today. Return only the modified data object.

analyze_margins.label: Analyze Margins
analyze_margins.prompt: Analyze my product prices. Which product has the highest margin and which has the lowest?

increase_prices.label: Increase Prices by 5%
increase_prices.prompt: Increase the prices of all my products and services by 5%. Return only the modified data object.

worst_case.label: Create Pessimistic Scenario
worst_case.prompt: Create a pessimistic scenario: Reduce sales for all products by 15% for the entire planning period. Return only the modified data object.

top_product.label: Find Top-Selling Product
top_product.prompt: Which product is expected to generate the most sales in the last planning year? Show me the calculation.

top_costs.label: Top 3 Cost Blocks
top_costs.prompt: Identify my top 3 cost blocks in the income statement for the first fiscal year.

break_even.label: Break-Even Analysis
break_even.prompt: When am I expected to reach the break-even point? Explain the result.

bottlenecks.label: Find Liquidity Bottlenecks
bottlenecks.prompt: Analyze my liquidity plan. Are there months where a bottleneck is imminent? If so, when and how large is the gap?

profit_vs_liquidity.label: Profit vs. Liquidity
profit_vs_liquidity.prompt: Explain the difference between profit and liquidity based on my planning data.

roi.label: Calculate ROI
roi.prompt: What is my Return on Investment (ROI) at the end of the planning period and how is it calculated?

payback.label: Find Payback Period
payback.prompt: When has my initial investment paid off? Give me the exact month.

persona.label: What is an AI Persona?
persona.prompt: Explain to me what an AI persona is and how it affects my interaction with you.

ai_modes.label: Difference in AI Modes
ai_modes.prompt: What is the difference between quality mode and web search? When should I use which mode?

print.title: Print Options
print.description: Select the plans you want to print.

email.title: Send Project via Email
email.subject: Subject
email.hint: Select the attachments you want to include.
email.default_body:
Hello,

attached you will find the export of the project "{{projectName}}".

Best regards
email.smtp_error: Please configure SMTP settings in the settings first.
email.success_partial: Email sent, but some recipients were rejected: {{rejected}}
email.error_server_html: The server responded with HTML instead of JSON. This indicates a crash or an incorrect route.

delete_project.title: Delete Project
delete_project.confirm: Do you really want to permanently delete the project "{{projectName}}"? This action cannot be undone.

reset_project.title: Reset Project
reset_project.confirm: Do you really want to reset the project "{{projectName}}"? All planning data will be reset to default values. This action cannot be undone.

cannot_delete_last.title: Action not possible
cannot_delete_last.text: The last remaining project cannot be deleted.

import_conflict.title: Import Conflict
import_conflict.text: A project with the name "{{projectName}}" already exists.
import_conflict.question: What do you want to do?

overwrite_confirm.title: Confirm Overwrite
overwrite_confirm.text: Are you absolutely sure you want to overwrite the project "{{projectName}}" with the data from the import file? All current data of this project will be lost.

asset.placeholder_description: Additional details about the investment asset...
asset.alert_name_required: Please provide a name for the investment asset.
asset.delete_confirm: Do you really want to delete the investment asset "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

subitem.alert_name_required: Please enter a name for the sub-item.
subitem.delete_confirm: Do you really want to delete the sub-item "{{name}}" permanently from all fiscal years?
subitem.reset_confirm: Do you really want to reset all values for fiscal year {{year}}? This action cannot be undone.

delete_chat.title: Delete Chat
delete_chat.confirm: Do you really want to delete this chat history? This action cannot be undone.
delete_chat.confirm_all: Do you really want to delete ALL saved chat histories for this project? This action cannot be undone.

import_chat.title: Confirm Import
import_chat.overwrite_msg: The following existing chats will be overwritten by the imported versions. Do you want to continue?
import_chat.new_chats_msg: {{count}} new chat(s) will also be added.

import_confirm.title: Confirm Import
import_confirm.text: Do you want to add the project "{{projectName}}" as a new project?

unsaved_changes.title: Unsaved Changes
unsaved_changes.switch_text: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to switch anyway and discard the changes?
unsaved_changes.new_project_text: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to create a new project anyway and discard the changes?

restore.title: Restore Save State
restore.confirm: Do you really want to restore the save state from {{date}}? All newer changes will be lost.

banken.title: Statistics for Banks
banken.cashflow_vs_kapitaldienst_title: Available Cash Flow vs. Debt Service

app.title: LOUIS AI
app.please_select_project: Please select a project or create a new one.
app.delete_last_project_hint: The last project cannot be deleted
app.error_boundary_text: The application could not load this area.
app.reset_chat_confirm_text: Do you really want to reset the current chat history? Saved versions of this chat will remain preserved.

absatzplan.title: Sales Forecast (Quantity)
absatzplan.fill_forward_hint: Apply value to all following months of this fiscal year
absatzplan.reset_year_confirm: Do you really want to reset all values for fiscal year {{year}}? This action cannot be undone.

grundeinstellungen.tax_rate_hint: Expected average tax rate on profit (Income and potentially Trade Tax OR Corporate and Trade Tax).
grundeinstellungen.vat_deductible_hint: Only activate if the company can reclaim input tax on purchases from the tax office (standard for regular taxation).
grundeinstellungen.print_text: Print the plans for your records. You can select which plans to print in the next step.
grundeinstellungen.share_text: Send the current state of your project via email to yourself or partners.
grundeinstellungen.share_hint: Note: The email will be sent via your configured SMTP server.
grundeinstellungen.reset_text: Resets all data of the current project to default values. This action cannot be undone.

finanzierungsplan.title: Financing Plan
finanzierungsplan.source_description_placeholder: Additional details about the financing source...
finanzierungsplan.delete_source_confirm: Do you really want to delete the financing entry "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

produktkalkulation.title: Product & Pricing
produktkalkulation.category_settings_hint: The settings made here apply to all products in the selected category and overwrite individual product details.
produktkalkulation.no_unit_selected: No revenue unit selected to display. Please select one from the list or add a new one.

produktkalkulation_details.cogs_hint: Sets variable costs as a percentage of the net price. Disabled if costs are entered manually or controlled by the category.
produktkalkulation_details.revenue_delay_hint: How many weeks is the payment delayed?
produktkalkulation_details.reserve_hint: Percentage of revenue held back (e.g., for warranties).
produktkalkulation_details.reserve_delay_hint: Additional delay for the held-back amount.
produktkalkulation_details.desc_placeholder: Add a description for this revenue unit...
produktkalkulation_details.cogs_auto_calc: Automatically calculated as costs are entered manually.
produktkalkulation_details.cogs_manual_hint: COGS in percent. Changes the 'Other' item.

data_management.title: Data Management
data_management.restore_hint: Restore one of the last 5 save states. Warning: Unsaved changes will be lost.
data_management.manage_chats_hint: Delete, export, or import your chat histories for the current project here.
data_management.no_saved_chats: No chats saved for this project.
data_management.export_import_hint: Back up your projects as JSON files or load a previously exported project file.
data_management.local_kb_hint: Manage documents that serve as background knowledge for the AI Assistant. All data remains local.

debug.title: Debug Panel
debug.set_alert: Temporary API key set. The page will reload to apply it.
debug.clear_alert: Temporary API key removed. The page will reload.

finanzierung.title: Financing Plan
finanzierung.source_name_required: Please enter a name for the source.

scenarios.empty_selection: Select scenarios above to display a comparison.

modal.description_placeholder: e.g., Optimistic case with 15% more sales...
modal.adjustments_empty: Add one or more adjustments to define this scenario.

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the scenario "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

validation.name_required: Please enter a name for the scenario.
validation.name_too_long: The scenario name must be 20 characters or less.

product_calc.category_name_required: Please enter a name for the category.
product_calc.cogs_hint: Leave empty to use individual product values.
product_calc.delete_unit_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone and also removes the associated data from the sales plan.
product_calc.delete_category_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the category "{{name}}"? Assigned products will lose their categorization.
product_calc.apply_settings_confirm: Are you sure you want to save the new settings for category "{{name}}"? This overrides the corresponding values for all assigned products.
